ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* The ID of the department head */,
  "department_size" INTEGER /* The number of employees in the department */,
  "department_budget" TEXT /* The annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* The physical location of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the department's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelor, Master) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the job role */,
  "role_requirements" TEXT /* A JSON array of requirements for the job role (e.g., skills, certifications) */,
  "role_responsibilities" TEXT /* A JSON array of responsibilities for the job role */,
  "role_hierarchy" INTEGER /* The hierarchy level of the job role within the organization */,
  "role_benefits" TEXT /* A JSON array of benefits associated with the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance rating */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Description of the performance rating scale */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of what each rating scale means */,
  "rating_criteria" TEXT /* A JSON array of criteria used to determine the performance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for marital status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_travel" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the business travel type */,
  "travel_type" TEXT /* Description of the business travel type */,
  "travel_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of business travel (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "travel_policy" TEXT /* A JSON array of travel policies and guidelines */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id")
)
